subcodes.first_line: O Lord, my refuge and sanctuary, my origin and return, my shelter and safeguard, the companion of my heart in my loneliness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا ملجای و ملاذی و مبدای و معادی و مامنی و معاذی و انیس قلبی فی وحشتی
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @station of the Manifestation of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God
